Hams—313.21] ‘31. zit-01mm yfia f‘zmw z—mfimwfiwafwmmmmwafisfimfi man169(31)arf11§231§a1986mm afimfiwfimmwmafitmfimafl 666(31),a1ika10‘of1 2003mmwmwm; afiz wafiufifiwwmfimmfimmmmafiafimfififi, m‘mw amen. 905(31), army 5 m, 2003, $1311 889(3),fi|fi'@l 5 arm, 2004,3130 166(3),?1161a 4 wait, 2005,$1.an1093(a1).ara@4 30m, 2005 30231311. 133(3),?0'8123 waft, 2006mmw mi 2317 GI/2006 (1‘) -- 1 of 2 -- 2 THE GAZETTE OF INDIA: EXTRAORDINARY [PART lI—SEC. 3(ii)] MINISTRY OF WATER RESOURCES NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 28th July, 2006 3.0. 1218(E).— Whereas the Government of India in the Ministry ofWater Resources vide notification number 8.0. 16905), dated the 2nd April, 1986, constituted the Ravi and Beas Waters Tribunal for verification and adjudication of certain matters referred therein, and the said Tribunal forwarded its report to the Central Government on 30th January, 1987; And whereas, further references have been made by the Central Government to the said Tribunal on 19th August, 1987 requiring explanation and guidance on the report aforesaid; - And whereas, considering the enormous exercise undertaken by the said Tribunal in completing its further report. the Central Government extended the period ofmaking the said report, from time to time, till the 5th August, 2006; And whereas, the Central Government, keeping in view the exigencies of the work involved, as pointed out by the said Tribunal, considers it necessary to extend the said period for another six months after the 5th August, 2006; Now therefore, in exercise of the powers conferred by the proviso to Sub—section (3) of Section 5 of the I nter—State River Water Disputes Act, 1956 (33 of 1956), the Central Government hereby further extends the period, within which the Tribunal may forward its report on the references so made, to the Central Government till the 5th day ofFebruary, 2007, and for that purpose makes the following further amendment in the notification of the Government of India in the Ministry of Water Resources number 5.0 905(E), dated the 5th August, 2003, namely :7 In the said notification, in the last paragraph, for the words, figures and letters “till the 5th day of Augist. 2006". the words, figures and letters “till the 5th day of February, 2007” shall be substituted. [R No. 15/3/85-l Ill] 1. HARI NARAYAN, Secy. Note :— The principal notification constituting the Ravi and Beas Waters Tribunal was published in the Gazette of India vide number 5.0, 169(E), dated the 2nd April, 1986 and subsequently amended vide number 8.0. 66603), dated the 10th June, 2003; and the period within which the Tribunal was required to forward its further report to the Central Government was extended from time to time vide number 8.0. 905(E), dated the 5th August, 2003, 8.0. 889(E), dated the 5thAugust, 2004; 50. 166(5), dated the 4th February, 2005; 8.0. 1093(E), dated the 4th August, 2005 and 8,0. l33(E), datedthe 3rd February, 2006. l’rlnted by the Managerirfiovt of India Press, Ring Road, Mayapuri, New Delhi»110(|64 and Published by the Controller of Publications, Delhi~110054. -- 2 of 2 --
